amendment: 2B-0 amendment (post-2B-1 adjudication): PIT-sector source = research.sic_observations; decision cutoff = ET-close via zoneinfo; Phase-2B execution-code identity bound. Run ID unchanged.
authorization: LIMITED DEVELOPMENT-PARTITION COMPUTATION; performance NOT authorized; validation/OOS sealed
decision_cutoff_rule: registered ET regular-session close 16:00 America/New_York -> UTC via zoneinfo (21:00Z standard / 20:00Z daylight per historical session date); NOT a fabricated fixed 21:00Z (which would leak 4-5pm ET evidence in summer).

frozen_mechanics.note: FROZEN; no Phase-2B work may alter these mechanics.

pit_sector_observation_source_rule.amends: the 2B-0 ratified contract's provenance sic_observations source (only 13 ciks); guarded + ledgered identically to every other real-data input.
pit_sector_observation_source_rule.pre_window_policy: earlier accepted observations allowed as PIT state seeds (allow_pre_window)
pit_sector_observation_source_rule.uniqueness_key: (cik, accepted_utc, accession); PIT selection = latest accepted_utc <= close t

sic_mapping_selection_rule.effective_time_selection: among rows covering the SIC, the latest effective_from <= close t governs (NULL effective_from = always-effective); range boundaries inclusive
sic_mapping_selection_rule.sector_lookup: the row whose [sic_start, sic_end] inclusive range contains the security's PIT SIC (from sic_observations.accepted_utc <= close t)
sic_mapping_selection_rule.sector_to_etf: the sector_etf column (11 SPDR select-sector ETFs); one ETF per sector

supersedes_phase2a_placeholder: the full run binds the registered sic_mapping for SIC->sector->ETF; the Phase-2A pit_sector_adapter division placeholder is a one-sample stand-in, replaced for the run.

universe_selection_rule.authorized_row_set: universe_month between 2013-01-01 and 2019-10-01 (82 governing months covering dev sessions 2013-01-02..2019-10-02)
universe_selection_rule.availability_convention: universe_month date is the reconstitution availability timestamp
universe_selection_rule.future_universe_month: excluded; can never influence session t
universe_selection_rule.governing_universe_month: max registered universe_month whose availability (= the universe_month date) is <= close(session t)
universe_selection_rule.membership_from: ONLY the rows of that single governing month
universe_selection_rule.missing_governing_month: INELIGIBLE:OLS_WINDOW_INSUFFICIENT is NOT used; a missing governing month is a universe-integrity failure -> INTEGRITY_STOP:SECURITY_IDENTITY_AMBIGUOUS (frozen)
universe_selection_rule.pre_window_seed: none required (the 2013-01 reconstitution governs the first dev session)
universe_selection_rule.survivorship: PIT, survivorship-free; never a present-day constituent list
